doc: The <tgr>52nd Academy of Country Music Awards</tgr>, also known as the 2017 ACM Awards, were held at the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada on April 2, 2017. Nominations for the <tgr>52nd Academy of Country Music Awards</tgr> were announced on February 16, 2017. Luke Bryan returned to host the show for his fifth consecutive year, with co-host Dierks Bentley returning for his third consecutive year. The winners are shown in bold. Source:
pred_ans:
| Event Name                           | Location             | Date       | Host(s)                        | Nomination Announcement Date |
|--------------------------------------|----------------------|------------|--------------------------------|------------------------------|
| 52nd Academy of Country Music Awards | T-Mobile Arena       | April 2, 2017 | Luke Bryan, Dierks Bentley    | February 16, 2017             |
